How it works

Your to-do list has
three lanes. We drive all of them.

Lane one · You

You spot it, we fix it

See something that needs doing? Point your camera at it and talk for 30 seconds. It lands on your list — we handle everything after.

🎥
"The back door sticks when it rains…"
0:27 video · added to your list
Lane two · Your Dandyman

Bill knows your home

Visit by visit, he learns the house. When he spots trouble coming, he'll suggest the 20-minute fix before it becomes the $2,000 repair.

"Your tub caulk is starting to lift — 20 minutes now saves a water-damage job later."

The membership math

1.5 hours a month.
Banked, not burned.

Every month, $149 adds 1.5 hours of your Dandyman's time to your bank — and they roll over, forever. Spend them your way:

🧰
Save three months → a full half day

One setup, one cleanup, the whole list knocked out in a single 4.5-hour visit. It's how most members use Dandy — and why homes on Dandy stay ahead instead of catching up.

⚡
Or spend 1.5 on a quick drop-in

Something can't wait? Your Dandyman swings by for the one fix that's bugging you.

✦
Either way, autopilot rides along

Filters, batteries, seasonal checks — folded into every visit, no hours required from you to remember them.

The drop model

50 spots per
neighborhood. That's it.

A Dandyman can truly care for about 50 homes — so that's where we stop. When a neighborhood opens, spots drop all at once. When they're gone, they're gone until someone moves away.

✦The last drop — Druid Hills — sold out in 4 days. Join the waitlist and you'll get first dibs when your neighborhood opens.
Join the waitlist

East Atlanta · Next drop
Questions

Fair asks.

What if I don't use my hours every month?＋
They bank. Hours roll over indefinitely — most members save three months and book one glorious half-day visit each quarter. Your balance is always visible in the app.
Is it really the same handyman every time?＋
Yes — that's the whole product. Your Dandyman is a full-time, background-checked Dandy employee assigned to about 50 homes in your neighborhood, including yours. If he's ever out sick, we'll tell you before the visit, never surprise you at the door.
What counts as autopilot?＋
Routine care every home needs: HVAC filter swaps, smoke detector batteries, first-story gutter checks, weatherstripping and caulk inspection, dryer vent clearing, and seasonal checks. Your Dandyman folds them into visits automatically.
What if a job is too big for a visit?＋
Your Dandyman will tell you straight, help you scope it, and connect you with a vetted specialist. We'd rather protect your trust than stretch a job.
Can I cancel?＋
Anytime, month-to-month. Fair warning: your neighborhood spot goes back into the drop, and drops sell out.
